# aikido_zen_app_ip_lists (Resource)

Manages threat actor IP lists and Tor traffic configuration for a Zen app in Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_zen_app_ip_lists" "api" {
  app_id   = aikido_zen_app.api.id
  tor_mode = "block"

  known_threat_actors {
    code = "apt1"
    mode = "block"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The ID of the Zen app.

### Optional

- `known_threat_actors` (Attributes List) Known threat actor IP list subscriptions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--known_threat_actors))
- `tor_mode` (String) Tor traffic mode: `ignore`, `monitor`, or `block`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--known_threat_actors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `known_threat_actors`

Required:

- `code` (String) The threat actor list code.
- `mode` (String) Subscription mode: `monitor` or `block`.
